title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's growing importance as a hub for polymer technology and manufacturing innovation.

title: Charlotte City Council to Decide on Mayor Lyles' Replacement
summary: Charlotte City Council has less than two months to decide who will fill Mayor Vi Lyles' seat.
charlotte_impact: The selection process will significantly impact the city's leadership and future policy decisions.

title: Sunshine for Mother's Day, Rain Expected Monday
summary: Charlotte enjoys sunshine for Mother's Day, but a cold front will bring showers and thunderstorms on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update, relevant for planning weekend and early-week activities.

title: Overnight Shooting in Charlotte Claims Two Lives
summary: Police responded to a shooting on Rozzelles Ferry Road in Charlotte, where two people were found dead.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about rising crime rates and public safety in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: East Charlotte Neighbors Oppose Proposed Data Center
summary: Residents in East Charlotte are pushing back against a proposed data center, demanding stronger regulations.

title: Shooting in Northwest Charlotte Injures One

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested

title: Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion's Impact
